seo.title: Events & Game Day | PRK 101 Carlsbad
seo.description: What's happening at Park 101 — NFL Sundays, Padres games, UFC fight nights, live music, and themed nights in Carlsbad Village.

hero.heading:
Always Something
On
hero.body: NFL Sundays, Padres games, fight nights, and live music every week — Park 101's LED wall and 20+ screens make sure you don't miss it.

inquiry.heading: Book a Game Day Space
inquiry.body: Fantasy drafts, big fights, and full-season Sunday plans — send us your date and headcount and our events team responds within 24 hours.
